steps.title: This protocol performs mastermix and DNA...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs mastermix and DNA sample transfer to a custom 384-well plate. All DNA samples are transferred in quadruplicate in adjacent wells forming 2x2 well squares on the 384-well plate (12x8 squares mapping to the 12x8 input from the 96-well DNA plate), as in the following image: --- * MicroAmp Optical 384-well plate * USA Scientific 96 Well Plate 100 µL * Custom single-channel reservoir 25ml (will span slots 4 and 1) * [Opentrons P10 multi-channel GEN1 pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette?variant=5984202489885) * [Opentrons 10µl tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips) ---

steps.title: Input the mount side for your...
steps.instruction: Input the mount side for your P10 multi-channel GEN1 pipette and the number of DNA samples to process (1-96, processed in columns of 8).

steps.title: Upload your custom labware and protocol...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware and protocol script into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
